news.t: Matthews Appoints Tiffany Hsiao as Portfolio Manager of the Matthews China Small Companies and Matthews Asia Innovators Strategies

holdings.infoBox: MCHS is an equity ETF with a total of 53 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Matthews China Innovators Active ETF (MCHS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund invests in Chinese companies believed to be innovators in their products, services, processes, technology, or approach. The actively managed fund invests in companies of any market capitalization with perceived sustainable growth potential. MCHS was launched on Jan 10, 2024 and is issued by Matthews.

data.title: Matthews Appoints Tiffany Hsiao as Portfolio Manager of the Matthews China Small Companies and Matthews Asia Innovators Strategies
data.text: SAN FRANCISCO, Dec. 15, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Matthews, a privately owned boutique investment management firm focused on Asia and Emerging Markets, today announced that Tiffany Hsiao has been appoi...
